title: quercus robur subsp. eurobur
intro: Quercus robur subsp. eurobur, also known as the English oak, is a subspecies of the Quercus robur tree, native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus robur subsp. eurobur include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Quercus robur subsp. eurobur is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be found in various herbal supplements and formulations.
